svg.title: Four reasons Windows is breaking down
svg.desc: Nadella's underinvestment plus 30 years of legacy debt produce four structural symptoms, leading to user harm and the case for migrating to Linux

g.text: Root cause: Nadella does not invest in Windows
Windows treated as a cash machine, not a platform
Forced 32GB / memory price surge / Copilot pushed
Old PCs discarded / liability shifted to users
Office EOL in 5 months / .NET in 6 months
The way out: migrate to Linux all at once
A sinking ship — there's only escape
